title: Chatbots Struggle With News Accuracy, Sourcing Ahead of Midterms
description: Four major artificial intelligence chatbots — OpenAI’s ChatGPT, Alphabet Inc.’s Google Gemini, Anthropic’s Claude and xAI’s Grok — are struggling to fairly and accurately answer questions about elections and geopolitics, according to a new study from Forum AI.
